behavior_summary: This script is a thin glue layer for a sorcerer NPC. Its processes mostly forward engine events to shared sorcerer and spell-combat routines rather than implement behavior locally.
U8P_MENTAR::look delegates U8P_MENTAR::look/update logic to SORCERER::func039C when the engine queries or updates the NPC's perception.

Fast-area triggers are handled: U8P_MENTAR::enterFastArea notifies the sorcerer AI of an entering actor via SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer, and U8P_MENTAR::leaveFastArea resets activity via SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity.
U8P_MENTAR::cast hands off casting to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop (likely passing its parameter) and then yields.
notable_control_flow: All process entry points immediately call external subsystem routines (SORCERER or SPELCMBT) and then suspend — the script itself contains no branching or state changes.
U8P_MENTAR::enterFastArea and U8P_MENTAR::leaveFastArea act as event triggers that call detection/reset routines for the sorcerer AI.
U8P_MENTAR::cast is an entry point for spellcasting that delegates to the shared combat spell loop; parameter passing is present but the meaning is inferred.
open_questions: What concrete value/meaning does the uword parameter to U8P_MENTAR::cast (param1) carry — likely a spell id or code but not confirmed.
Which in-game events (AI scheduler vs. direct player action) call U8P_MENTAR::cast in typical encounters?
Are there any higher-level global flags or state changes elsewhere in the codebase triggered by the called SORCERER or SPELCMBT routines that affect this NPC?

main_function.name: U8P_MENTAR::look
main_function.purpose: Serve as the NPC's 'U8P_MENTAR::look' / update entry point and delegate perception/AI U8P_MENTAR::look logic to a shared sorcerer handler.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the NPC is examined or the game updates NPC perception (U8P_MENTAR::look/update process).
Acts as the canonical U8P_MENTAR::look handler for this sorcerer-type NPC and immediately forwards to SORCERER::func039C.

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::look
function_map.role: U8P_MENTAR::look/update entry point that delegates to sorcerer-specific handler

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::use
function_map.role: utility entry point for 'U8P_MENTAR::use' interactions; delegates to sorcerer utility

function_map.role: fast-area trigger; notifies sorcerer AI of entering actor

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit trigger; requests sorcerer activity reset

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::cast
function_map.role: initiates spellcasting by delegating to the combat spell loop (accepts a uword parameter)

function_map.name: SORCERER::func039C
function_map.role: external sorcerer handler for U8P_MENTAR::look/update (called by U8P_MENTAR::look)

function_map.name: SORCERER::func05EC
function_map.role: external sorcerer utility for U8P_MENTAR::use interactions (called by U8P_MENTAR::use)

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer
function_map.role: detect player presence / update AI state (called by U8P_MENTAR::enterFastArea)

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop
function_map.role: shared combat spellcasting loop invoked by U8P_MENTAR::cast

external_calls.purpose: Perform the sorcerer-specific U8P_MENTAR::look/update logic for the NPC (delegation)
Notify sorcerer AI that an actor (likely the player) has entered the fast-area trigger so it can respond (alert/engage)
Request that the sorcerer AI reset its activity/state when the actor leaves range
Run the NPC's combat spellcasting loop, likely consuming the uword parameter as a spell identifier (inferred)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script is a thin glue layer for a sorcerer NPC. Its processes mostly forward engine events to shared sorcerer and spell-combat routines rather than implement behavior locally.
